quoted_text:
U.S. AND IRAN DISCUSS MOVING UP SIGNING OF DEAL, SOURCES SAY

Donald Trump’s administration, Iran, and mediators are discussing moving up the signing of a memorandum of understanding to as early as Wednesday via remote signing, sources say. If confirmed, provisions on reopening the Strait of Hormuz could take effect sooner and the deal text may be released. Final timing remains undecided, while planned Friday talks in Switzerland are still expected to proceed.
